action.reasoning: Observation: predict.py failed due to device mismatch - feat_mean/feat_std loaded from checkpoint are on CPU while features are computed on GPU. Also predict.py is truncated at the SWA section. Analysis: Need to fix the device issue by ensuring feat_mean/feat_std are moved to the same device as features, and write a complete predict.py. Decision: Write complete predict.py with all TTA strategies, fix device issues, submit eval on the new best.pt (val_acc=0.9022).
